signals.headline: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
signals.summary: US President Donald Trump has imposed a 50% tariff on a wide range of goods imported from Canada, in retaliation for what he called "unequal treatment" of US cars, dairy and alcohol.
keyTakeaways: Prime Minister Mark Carney responded by saying Canada stood ready to "intensify" trade talks with the US in the coming weeks.
These tensions have been simmering since Trump returned to office in January 2025 and unleashed a wide-ranging global programme of tariffs.
Tariffs are taxes on imported goods that are paid to the government by companies bringing in the foreign products.
signals.whyItMatters: It marks a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

ja.headline: 米、カナダ産品に50%関税　両国の通商交渉に緊張高まる
ja.summary: トランプ米大統領は、自動車・乳製品・酒類をめぐる「不平等な扱い」を理由に、カナダからの幅広い輸入品に50%の関税を課した。
keyTakeaways: カーニー首相は、今後数週間で米国との通商交渉を「強化」する姿勢を示した。
両国間の緊張は、トランプ大統領が2025年1月に就任して以来、広範な関税政策とともに高まり続けてきた。
関税とは、外国製品を輸入する企業が政府に納める輸入税のことだ。
ja.whyItMatters: 北米の隣国同士の貿易摩擦が、大きな局面を迎えた。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: So Trump just put a fifty percent tariff on Canadian goods?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Yes, on a wide range of imports from Canada. He says it's retaliation for what he calls unequal treatment of US cars, dairy, and alcohol.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: That's a huge tariff. How did Canada respond?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Prime Minister Mark Carney said Canada is ready to intensify trade talks with the US in the coming weeks.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Has this been building for a while?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It has. These tensions have been simmering since Trump returned to office in January and started a wide-ranging global tariff program.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Just to be clear, what exactly is a tariff?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It's a tax on imported goods. Companies bringing in foreign products pay it to the government.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: And why does this matter so much between these two countries?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It marks a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbors. They're deeply connected economically.

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: アメリカのトランプ大統領が、カナダからの輸入品に50%の関税をかけました。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 理由は、自動車や乳製品、酒類の扱いが不公平だというものです。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: これに対し、カナダのカーニー首相は、今後数週間で交渉を強める考えを示しています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 関税とは、海外から商品を運び込む企業が政府に納める税金のことです。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: トランプ大統領は今年1月に就任して以来、世界各地に向けて関税を広げてきました。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 今回の措置は、隣り合う二つの国の間で、貿易の対立が新たな段階に入ったことを意味します。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 朝の買い物や仕事に使う製品の値段にも、影響が出る可能性があります。

signals.headline: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
signals.summary: Thousands of supporters of the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), a youth-led protest movement seeking education and employment reforms, defied a police ban and tried to march on parliament to demand India's education minister resign.
keyTakeaways: Police wielding canes used tear gas to disperse crowds in central Delhi.
It gathered fresh momentum over the weekend after police forcibly moved activist Sonam Wangchuk into hospital on the 21st day of a hunger strike in support of the movement.
The movement takes its name from a remark by India's chief justice, who drew criticism after comparing sections of unemployed young people to "cockroaches" during a court hearing.
signals.whyItMatters: On Monday, Wangchuk appealed to doctors to discharge him so he could join the march but was not allowed.

ja.headline: 「ゴキブリ」を名乗る若者たちが国会へ行進、警察が阻止
ja.summary: 教育・雇用改革を求める若者主導の抗議運動「コックローチ・ジャンタ党（CJP）」の支持者数千人が、警察の禁止令を無視してインド国会への行進を試みた。教育相の辞任を求めるデモは、当局によって阻まれた。
keyTakeaways: 警察は催涙ガスと警棒でデリー中心部の群衆を解散させた。
活動家ソナム・ワンチュクがハンガーストライキ21日目に警察によって強制入院させられたことで、運動は週末に勢いを増した。
運動の名称は、最高裁長官が法廷で失業中の若者を「ゴキブリ」に例えた発言への批判から生まれた。
ja.whyItMatters: 月曜日、ワンチュクは行進に加わるため退院を求めたが、認められなかった。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: I saw something about protesters being called cockroaches in India. What's happening there?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Thousands of protesters tried to march on parliament in Delhi, demanding the education minister resign. Police used tear gas and canes to stop them.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Why are they called the cockroach protesters?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: The movement is called the Cockroach Janta Party. The name comes from a comment India's chief justice made during a court hearing, comparing unemployed young people to cockroaches.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: That's pretty harsh. What are they actually asking for?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: They're a youth-led group seeking education and employment reforms. The protests grew after police forcibly hospitalized an activist named Sonam Wangchuk.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: What happened with him?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: He was on a hunger strike supporting the movement. Police moved him to hospital on the twenty-first day. On Monday, he asked doctors to discharge him so he could join the march, but wasn't allowed.

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: インドの首都デリーで、教育と雇用の改革を求める若者たちが国会に向かって行進しようとしました。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 警察は催涙ガスと警棒を使い、数千人の群衆を強制的に解散させています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: この運動は「コックローチ・ジャンタ党」と名乗っています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 名前の由来は、最高裁の長官が法廷で失業中の若者を「ゴキブリ」に例えた発言です。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 週末には、活動家のソナム・ワンチュクがハンガーストライキの21日目に強制入院させられました。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: これをきっかけに、運動への支持がさらに広がっています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: ワンチュクは行進に加わるため退院を求めましたが、認められていません。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 若者の不満が、こうした形で表に出ている状況です。

signals.headline: Almost 100 troops injured in recent weeks, Pentagon admits, as Iran launches reprisals on US allies
signals.summary: Nearly 100 US service members have been injured over the last two weeks of escalating strikes on Iran, the Pentagon has said, as Tehran launched a wave of reprisals to the tenth consecutive night of attacks.
keyTakeaways: Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan all said they had activated defences to repel the attacks, but the scale of US injuries at facilities across the region over recent week is likely to bring greater scrutiny to Iran’s reprisal attacks.
Pentagon spokesperson Sean Parnell said the vast majority of those injured only experienced “minor concussions” and 96% had since returned to work.
Parnell was responding to a New York Times report that the Pentagon has withheld information about troop injuries from Iranian strikes.
signals.whyItMatters: The escalation has pushed oil prices higher in recent weeks.

ja.headline: 米兵約100人が負傷——ペンタゴンが認める
ja.summary: イランによる報復攻撃が続くなか、ペンタゴンは過去2週間で米兵約100人が負傷したと明らかにした。テヘランは10夜連続となる攻撃への報復として、クウェート、バーレーン、ヨルダンなど米国の同盟国にも攻撃を仕掛けた。
keyTakeaways: クウェート、バーレーン、ヨルダンはいずれも防衛システムを起動して攻撃を迎撃。中東各地の施設での負傷者数は、イランの報復攻撃への scrutinyをさらに高めそうだ。
ペンタゴン報道官のショーン・パーネルは、負傷者の大半は「軽度の脳震盪」にとどまり、96%がすでに職務に復帰していると述べた。
パーネルの発言は、ペンタゴンがイランの攻撃による負傷情報を公表していなかったとするニューヨーク・タイムズの報道を受けたものだ。
ja.whyItMatters: この緊張の高まりを背景に、原油価格はここ数週間で上昇している。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: I saw something about US troops being injured in the Middle East. What's happening?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: The Pentagon confirmed that nearly 100 service members have been injured over the last two weeks during escalating strikes involving Iran.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: That's a lot. How serious are the injuries?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: According to Pentagon spokesperson Sean Parnell, most experienced minor concussions, and 96% have already returned to work.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: So Iran is striking back at US facilities?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Yes. Tehran launched reprisals following ten consecutive nights of attacks. Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan all activated defenses to repel those strikes.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Why are we only hearing about this now?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Parnell was responding to a New York Times report suggesting the Pentagon withheld information about troop injuries from Iranian strikes.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Is this affecting anything beyond the region?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: The escalation has pushed oil prices higher in recent weeks, so it's having broader economic impact.

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: ペンタゴンが、この2週間で米軍兵士およそ100人が負傷していたと発表しました。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: イランが連日続けている攻撃への報復として、クウェートやバーレーン、ヨルダンといった米国の同盟国にも攻撃が及んでいます。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 各国は防衛システムを作動させて迎撃にあたりました。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 負傷者の大半は軽い脳震盪で、96%はすでに任務に戻っているとペンタゴンは説明しています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: この発表は、負傷の情報が公にされていなかったという報道を受けたものです。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 中東での緊張が続く中、原油の価格も上がり始めています。

signals.headline: Ford’s $30,000 electric truck: all the news about the company’s big EV re-do
signals.summary: The end of the Ford F-150 Lightning was also the start of a new era for the automaker.
keyTakeaways: After failing to capture the market with the electric version of its popular F-Series truck, Ford is going back to the drawing board with its Universal Electric Vehicle Platform.
The first offering will be a $30,000 electric truck, engineered for efficiency and also — perhaps most importantly — profitability.
The truck will be revealed in 2027, but Ford plans on building a whole family of low-cost electric vehicles at its Kentucky assembly plant.
signals.whyItMatters: Ford’s $30K electric truck could be smaller than a Maverick.

ja.headline: フォード、3万ドルの電動トラックで再出発
ja.summary: F-150ライトニングの終売は、フォードにとって終わりではなく転換点だった。同社は新たな共通電動プラットフォームを軸に、EVの刷新へと踏み出している。
keyTakeaways: 人気のFシリーズ電動版が市場で振るわず、フォードは設計を根本から見直す方針に転じた
最初の一台は3万ドルの電動トラック——効率性と収益性を両立させることが開発の核心にある
2027年に発表予定で、ケンタッキーの組立工場では低価格EVのラインアップ展開を計画
ja.whyItMatters: この3万ドルトラックは、マーベリックより小さくなる可能性がある。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: So Ford is starting over with electric trucks?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: In a way, yes. They're ending production of the F-150 Lightning and shifting to a completely new approach with what they're calling a Universal Electric Vehicle Platform.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: What went wrong with the Lightning?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Ford says it didn't capture the market the way they hoped. So now they're focusing on something different — efficiency and profitability.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: And this new truck is going to be cheaper?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Much cheaper. They're targeting a thirty thousand dollar price point, which is significantly lower than the Lightning.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: When can people actually buy one?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It'll be revealed in 2027. Ford plans to build it at their Kentucky assembly plant, along with a whole family of low-cost electric vehicles.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: How small are we talking here?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Ford suggests it could be smaller than their Maverick, which is already their compact truck. So this is really about rethinking what an electric truck can be.

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: フォードが、3万ドルで買える電動トラックを作ります。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 同社の人気モデルFシリーズの電動版は、期待ほど売れませんでした。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: そこで設計を一から見直し、新しい共通の電動基盤を使うことにしたのです。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: この新しいトラックは、効率と利益の両立を最優先に開発されています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 2027年に姿を見せる予定で、ケンタッキーの工場では低価格の電動車を次々と作る計画です。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: サイズは既存のマーベリックより小さくなるかもしれません。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 手の届く価格の電動トラックが、選択肢として現実味を帯びてきました。

signals.headline: Get Borderlands 3, Risk of Rain 2 and 13 other great PC games for $15
signals.summary: The aptly-named “2K Megahits 2026 Bundle” from Humble includes 15 Steam games for $15.
keyTakeaways: The bundle will be available until August 7th, though the bundle page notes that keys for some games are already starting to run low.
All of the games work on Windows, while some support MacOS and SteamOS.
One of my personal favorite games, Risk of Rain 2, is included in the bundle.
signals.whyItMatters: It’s a smattering of the publisher 2K’s biggest games of the 2010s, including BioShock Infinite, Risk of Rain 2, Borderlands 3, and XCOM: Enemy Unknown.

ja.headline: 人気PCゲーム15本が約2200円のバンドルに
ja.summary: Humbleが販売する「2K Megahits 2026 Bundle」では、Steamゲーム15本をまとめて15ドルで入手できる。
keyTakeaways: 販売期限は8月7日。一部タイトルのキーはすでに残り少なくなっている。
全タイトルがWindowsに対応。MacOSおよびSteamOSをサポートするものも含まれる。
「Risk of Rain 2」もバンドルに収録されている。
ja.whyItMatters: 「BioShock Infinite」「Borderlands 3」「XCOM: Enemy Unknown」など、2Kが2010年代に送り出した主要タイトルが一堂に揃う。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: I saw something about a big game bundle deal. What's going on?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Humble is selling what they're calling the 2K Megahits 2026 Bundle — 15 Steam games for $15.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Fifteen dollars for fifteen games? What's in it?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It's a collection of 2K's biggest games from the 2010s. Think BioShock Infinite, Borderlands 3, XCOM: Enemy Unknown, and Risk of Rain 2.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Those are pretty well-known titles. How long is this available?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Until August 7th. Though the bundle page says keys for some games are already running low.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: So if someone's interested, they shouldn't wait too long.

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Exactly. All the games work on Windows, and some also support MacOS and SteamOS.

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: PCゲームの配信サイトHumbleで、15本のゲームを15ドルで買えるバンドルが販売されています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 2Kという会社が2010年代に出した代表作が揃っています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: BioShock InfiniteやBorderlands 3。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: XCOM: Enemy Unknownといった人気作が含まれています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: すべてWindowsで遊べて、一部はMacOSやSteamOSにも対応しています。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: 販売は8月7日までですが、一部のタイトルはすでにキーの在庫が少なくなっているようです。

captions.speaker: narrator
captions.text: まとめ買いでゲームを増やしたい人には、手頃な機会かもしれません。
